creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:32:25 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    german/alt-aspell    Makefile 
    german/aspell        Makefile 
    german/bsdforen-firefox-searchplugin Makefile 
    german/digibux       Makefile 
    german/eric4         Makefile 
    german/geonext       Makefile 
    german/jdictionary-eng-ger Makefile 
    german/jdictionary-ger-hun Makefile 
    german/kheisereg     Makefile 
    german/ksteak        Makefile 
    german/steak         Makefile 
    german/tipp10        Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3       +1 -0      ports/german/alt-aspell/Makefile
